3051270.name: FPV Worldwide
3051270.description: Dive into a unique FPV drone simulator on Steam, where every corner of the globe is yours to explore without the limitations of laws, battery life, or drone range. Rendered in stunning detail with Unreal Engine 5, this simulator lets you share favorite spots with a community of enthusiasts, perfect for freestyle or cinematic flights. Adjust the weather, use your own controllers for an authentic feel, and stabilize your camera for smooth footage. Search and teleport anywhere worldwide for an unmatched flying experience. Perfect for hobbyists and pros alike.
3051270.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 保加利亚语, 繁体中文, 韩语, 丹麦语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 芬兰语, 希腊语, 匈牙利语, 印度尼西亚语, 日语, 挪威语, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 瑞典语, 捷克语, 泰语, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 越南语
